name: cortex-vision
description: On-device vision capture MCP for Cortex (macOS). Grabs an image (screen capture, image file, or camera frame), runs an on-device Apple Vision task (OCR, scene labels, or barcodes), classifies the extracted text as a recall query or a memory, and returns it plus a routing hint. Eyes-only: it never reads or writes memories — the caller chains to the Cortex MCP recall/remember tools.

default_source.title: Default capture source
default_source.description: Where look grabs an image when called without an explicit source: 'screen' (ScreenCaptureKit/screencapture), 'file' (an image path), or 'camera' (AVFoundation frame grab).

default_task.title: Default vision task
default_task.description: Which Vision task look runs when called without an explicit task: 'ocr' (recognize text), 'scene' (classify/label), or 'barcode' (detect barcodes/QR).

default_mode.title: Default routing mode
default_mode.description: How look routes when called without an explicit mode: 'auto' (classify recall vs remember), 'recall', or 'remember'.
